name: observability-and-instrumentation
description: Instruments production systems with structured logs, RED metrics, tracing

positive_triggers.input: We're about to deploy this new service to production
positive_triggers.reason: New service going to prod, needs instrumentation

positive_triggers.input: On-call is getting paged but we can't figure out what's wrong from logs
Add a new background job to process uploaded files

behavioral_evals.scenario: User asks: 'Deploy this new service to production'
expected_behavior: Agent adds structured logging (fields, not string concat) at key state changes
Agent instruments RED metrics: rate / errors / duration per request
Agent adds tracing spans for cross-service calls
Agent configures symptom-based alerts (error rate > X%, P95 > Y ms)
Agent uses correct log levels (ERROR for failures, INFO for state changes, etc.)
Agent ensures no secrets / PII in logs
Agent writes runbook for known failure modes

behavioral_evals.scenario: User reports: 'On-call can't figure out what's wrong'
expected_behavior: Agent audits current observability: what's logged? what's metricked? what's traced?
Agent identifies gaps (e.g., no error counter, no tracing)
Agent adds missing instrumentation BEFORE attempting root cause
Agent updates runbook to reference new metrics

notes: Behavioral evals are warning-level until promoted via upstream issue tracker.
